product_type: Vertical Rise Lift - Order Verification / Data Sheet

site_survey_fields.overhead_obstructions: yes or no, customer to specify

installation_requirements.electrical_connection_note: Final electrical connection to local/national code is the responsibility of the electrical contractor. More than one point of connection may be required. Disconnect switches, main fuses, main power leads, etc., are NOT provided by Mohawk Lifts, LLC.
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power_note: Pneumatic power is the responsibility of the mechanical contractor to the final designated point or points at the vehicle lift unless otherwise specified by architect.
installation_requirements.control_console_routing: Routes to one primary leg (choose Leg A, B, C, or D)
installation_requirements.control_console_extra_length_note: Lengths over standard 20 ft are charged at extra cost
installation_requirements.shimming_note: Examine floor for flatness. If shimming exceeds 1/2 inch, base plates are recommended. Shims not included with standard lift - additional charge.

features: Heavy duty drive-on runway design for 85K-99K capacity range
Surface mount or flush mount installation options
Multiple ramp length options (106, 118, 134, 138 double slope)
4-leg control console routing (A, B, C, D positions)
Wider tracks (36.6 inches) compared to 35-77K models (29.9 inches)
optional_equipment: 138 inch double slope approach ramps (additional cost)
Shims / base plates for uneven floors (additional charge)
Extended control console routing beyond 20 ft standard (additional cost)
Other options (may impact ID and OD dimensions)
notes: Ramp lengths other than standard 106 inches are at additional cost - contact rep for pricing
Standard installation width (ID) is 46.5 inches between tracks
RJ Rails are 2.55 inches wide, located on inside of each track
Track lights, toe guards, and other options may impact ID and OD dimensions
Control console lengths over standard 20 ft are charged at extra cost
If shimming exceeds 1/2 inch, base plates are recommended (additional charge)
Specifications subject to change without notice
85-99K models use wider 36.6 inch tracks vs 29.9 inch tracks on 35-77K models
85-99K models have larger overall OD of 119.8 inches vs 106.4 inches on 35-77K models
85-99K ramp collapsed heights are taller (380mm/15.0 inches) vs 35-77K (350mm/13.8 inches)
Similar layout to VRL-Data-Sheet-35-77K but with different track dimensions and ramp profiles for higher capacity
